description_long: This bench features a modern design with a seat and backrest made of horizontal wooden slats, finished in a deep reddish-brown color. The frame is constructed from dark metal, with distinctive circular side supports that serve as both armrests and structural legs. The bench is wide enough to comfortably seat two to three people and has a sturdy, robust appearance. The metal frame is likely powder-coated for weather resistance, making it suitable for outdoor use. The wooden slats are evenly spaced, providing both comfort and ventilation. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, blending industrial metalwork with classic wooden seating.
description: A modern bench with reddish-brown wooden slats and dark metal circular side supports, combining comfort and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the circular metal armrest and the alignment of the wooden slats.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the seat and backrest, as well as the symmetrical circular metal supports.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the circular armrest and slat arrangement seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the backrest slats and the connecting metal frame.
